name: maranello-luce-design-business — Full API Catalog
description: Complete API surface for AI agent discoverability. See components.json for summary.

observers.description: IntersectionObserver-based lazy gauge init, scroll-reveal, nav tracking, and WCAG auto-contrast

initGauges.desc: Lazily initialize FerrariGauge when canvas scrolls into view

initScrollReveal.desc: Add visible class to .mn-reveal elements on intersection

initNavTracking.desc: Highlight nav link matching current scroll section

relativeLuminance.desc: Compute WCAG relative luminance from rgb() color string

autoContrast.desc: Apply dark/light text based on background luminance

gauge-engine-class.description: Factory and lifecycle utilities for FerrariGauge; re-exports core class

createGauge.desc: Create single gauge from canvas element or CSS selector

createGaugesInContainer.desc: Create all gauges within a container

redrawAll.desc: Redraw all gauge instances (after theme change)

speedometer-palette.description: Constants, palette, and types shared by speedometer.ts and speedometer-draw.ts

speedoPalette.desc: Theme-aware palette (reads body class: mn-colorblind, mn-nero)

speedometer-draw.description: Canvas drawing functions for speedometer — extracted from speedometer.ts

drawSpeedometer.sig: (ctx, dim, s, cx, cy, R, curAngle, curVal, barVal, opts: SpeedoDrawOptions) => void
drawSpeedometer.desc: Full-frame speedometer render: background, arc, ticks, needle, cap, text, optional bar

h-bar-chart-draw.description: DOM drawing primitives and render engine for HBarChart — extracted from charts-hbar.ts

hexLum.desc: WCAG relative luminance from hex color

createEl.sig: (tag: string, cls?: string, text?: string) => HTMLElement

clampVal.sig: (v: number, min: number, max: number) => number

renderHBar.desc: Full render of horizontal bar chart into DOM context

data-binding-events.description: ESM event bus facade — emit/on/off + re-exports bind/autoBind/onDrillDown from data-binding

exports.bind: from data-binding — bind element to URL/fetch with optional interval
exports.onDrillDown: from data-binding — register drill-down click handler

data-binding-ui.description: Higher-level data binding: live gauge update, chart polling, slider/control REST binding

updateGauge.sig: (canvas: HTMLCanvasElement, newConfig: Partial<GaugeConfig>, gaugeMap?: Map) => void

bindChart.desc: Fetch data and render chart; optional polling interval

bindControl.desc: Bind a control to REST endpoint for read/write

icons-az.description: Extended icon set (supplemental A-Z icons with generic names)

exports.azIcons: Record<string, () => string> — SVG string factories: project, workspace, + additional domain-neutral icons

detail-panel.description: Detail panel controller — creates panel with edit/save/close lifecycle

detail-panel-ui.description: Panel DOM construction — skeleton, tabs, footer, field rendering

exports.renderBody: Render fields for current tab (read or edit mode)

detail-panel-editors.description: Edit-mode field editors for DetailPanel (text, select, date, person-search, tags)

registerDatePicker.desc: Register external date picker for calendar button support

detail-panel-renderers.description: Read-only field renderers for DetailPanel (text, badge, date, person, tags, url, score)

exports.updateStatusSelectColor: Update select element color based on status value

a11y-panel.description: Accessibility panel controller — FAB trigger, settings panel, keyboard nav, outside-click

a11yPanel.desc: Mount a11y FAB + slide-out settings panel. Returns controller with getSettings, reset, destroy.

a11y-panel-dom.description: A11y panel DOM builder — builds panel UI, handles localStorage persistence and CSS application

exports.applySettings: (s: A11ySettings) => void — applies CSS vars / body classes

controls-dialogs.description: Dropdown and tabs init with full keyboard navigation and ARIA roles

initTabs.desc: Wire tab buttons to content panels with keyboard support

controls-drag.description: Rotary knob and linear slider drag controls with eventBus integration

initRotary.desc: Needs .mn-rotary__housing, .mn-rotary__pointer children. Emits slider-change on eventBus.

initSlider.desc: Needs .mn-slider__track, .mn-slider__thumb children. Emits slider-change on eventBus.

map-view.description: Canvas world map factory — clustered markers, tooltips, zoom/pan, theme awareness

mapView.sig: (container: HTMLElement | null, opts?: MapViewOptions) => MapViewController | null

map-view-events.description: Map event handling — pan, zoom, pinch-to-zoom, drag, hit-testing, tooltip management

exports.attachMapEvents: Attach pointer/touch/wheel events to canvas with shared event state

map-view-helpers.description: Map projection, clustering, marker drawing, legend, hit-testing utilities

exports.clusterMarkers: Cluster nearby markers by pixel distance
exports.drawMarker: Draw single or cluster marker on canvas
exports.hitTest: Test pointer position against rendered markers
exports.detectTheme: Read body class and return ThemePalette
exports.getMarkerColors: Return fill/stroke colors by MarkerColor and theme

mn-chart.description: Wraps all canvas-only chart types: sparkline, donut, barChart, areaChart, radar, bubble, liveGraph, halfGauge

mn-hbar.description: DOM-based horizontal bar chart Web Component

mn-data-table.description: Full-featured data table Web Component with sort, filter, group, paginate

icons.desc: Core icon registry — merge of all sub-modules

icons-actions.desc: Action icons: edit, delete, add, search, filter, share, download, upload...

icons-data.desc: Data icons: chart, table, database, analytics, report...

icons-nav.desc: Navigation icons: home, menu, chevron, arrow, close, back...

icons-objects.desc: Object icons: calendar, clock, user, team, location, document, layers...

icons-status.desc: Status icons: check, warning, error, info, spinner, lock, unlock...

icons-az.desc: Extended supplemental icons: project (was engagement), workspace (was studio)

core/types.desc: All shared TypeScript interfaces and types for the design system

core/utils.desc: Shared utilities: createElement, cssVar, clamp, debounce, throttle

core/events.desc: EventBus class with typed on/off/emit and eventBus singleton export
